findings.description: A100 draws 65-68W at idle 0MB VRAM 0pct util for 23 minutes
HBM clock locked at 1593MHz for entire 23 minute idle — never changes
GPU1 spontaneous SM clock burst to 1350MHz — power spike to 107W — GPU0 unaffected — HBM unchanged
GPU1 consistently 2-3W higher than GPU0 throughout entire test
A100 stays at P0 — never drops to P8 unlike consumer GPUs

security_finding: Spontaneous autonomous GPU activity at 0pct utilization — NVML completely blind — potential undisclosed GPU microcode execution
conclusion: Ghost power confirmed. HBM locked. Spontaneous burst captured. GPU asymmetry confirmed. All findings reproducible.
